params.builder: The address authorized to update the flashblock index.

returns.blockNumber: The block number at which the index was set.

BUILDER().notice: The authorized builder address, set at deploy time.

get().notice: Returns the last stored flashblock index and its associated block number.

BUILDER().notice: The authorized builder address, set at deploy time.

get().notice: Returns the last stored flashblock index and its associated block number.

FlashblockIndexUpdated(uint8,uint48).notice: Emitted when the flashblock index is updated.

InvalidCalldata().notice: Thrown when calldata is not exactly 1 byte.

OnlyBuilder().notice: Thrown when the caller is not the authorized builder.

userdoc.notice: Stores the current flashblock index alongside block.number.

devdoc.details: The builder calls this via fallback with 1 byte of calldata (the index as uint8).      Both values are manually packed into a single uint256 to guarantee 1 SSTORE per write.

params.builder: The address authorized to update the flashblock index.

returns.blockNumber: The block number at which the index was set.

params.blockNumber: The block number at which the index was set.

documentation.text: @notice Thrown when the caller is not the authorized builder.
@notice Thrown when calldata is not exactly 1 byte.
@notice The authorized builder address, set at deploy time.

@notice Packed storage: blockNumber (uint48) in bits [55:8] | flashblockIndex (uint8) in bits [7:0].
 @dev Using uint48 for block numbers is safe for the foreseeable future (~281 trillion blocks).

@notice Constructor.
 @param builder The address authorized to update the flashblock index.
